trans-unit.source: A user with this email is already added
Invitation sent. The user will get access on first sign-in.
No users yet. Invite the first member.
Deactivate ? The user will immediately lose access to the system.
Check the URL or return to the bookings list.
Try again later or return to the bookings list.
Delete document ""? This action cannot be undone.
Ooooops, no clients found. Try adjusting your filters.
Due date must be the same as or after invoice date.
At least one line item is required.
Provide a reason for cancelling invoice .
Delete payment of ? This action is irreversible.
Unable to load PDF. Please try again.
No invoices found for current filters
After publishing, the invoice cannot be edited. Client and issuer details will be locked.
Invoice published and issued to the client.
Error publishing invoice. Please try again.
No more than 2 decimal places allowed
Payment date cannot be in the future
Departure to must be on or after departure from
Return date must be on or after departure date
Status filter is disabled in Kanban view.
No leads found for the current filters
Trip request was not found. Fill travel details manually and continue creating the offer.
Save a draft before opening PDF preview.
Unable to load PDF. Please try again.
Status filter is disabled in Kanban view.
No offers found for the current filters
You have access to multiple organizations. Select one to continue.
